DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION BY TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS NOS. 1-4 ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. CCP 233.280. PLAINTIFF RAYMOND DASALLA IS ORDERED TO PAY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $750 WITHIN 30 DAYS. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON MINNIS; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Dismissal - No Appearance

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion By To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Hunter W. Sims III, Deputy City Attorney CCSF, Telephone (415)554-4259, appearing for Defendabt SF Muni et al;

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion By To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions

Granted, no opposition filed. The matters in Request for Admissions Nos. 1-4 are deemed admitted. CCP 233.280. Plaintiff Raymond DaSalla is ordered to pay defendant City and County of San Francisco sanctions in the amount of $750 within 30 days.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant City And County Of San Francisco To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Timothy J. Fama
